allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); links=d.get\('links',[]\); print\(json.dumps\(links[0], indent=2\)\) if links else print\('no links'\)")
Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(j.links?.[0], null, 2\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const keys=new Set\(\); j.links?.forEach\(l=>Object.keys\(l\).forEach\(k=>keys.add\(k\)\)\); console.log\('All keys across all links:', [...keys]\); console.log\('Total links:', j.links?.length\); }\)")
